law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal residence: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It shall be established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal residence, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their residence, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal of entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  has_belgian_nationality_proof: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_free_movement_right: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  is_present_on_territory: Person -> Bool
  meets_entry_or_residence_conditions: Person -> Bool
  previously_met_entry_or_residence_conditions: Person -> Bool
  has_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_passport: Person -> Bool
  has_valid_identity_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_by_national_authority_with_laissez_passer_willingness: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  absconding_risk_is_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  absconding_risk_established_by_individual_examination: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_objective_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_relevant_procedure: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
  entered_territory_illegally_without_residence_application: Person -> Bool
  in_illegal_residence_without_residence_application: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_submit_international_protection_application_in_time: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_1_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_2_met: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_3_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_4_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_5_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_termination_decision: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_6_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_7_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_8_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_9_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose: Person -> Bool
  file_shows_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_10_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_11_met: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~has_belgian_nationality_proof(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_free_movement_right(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_present_on_territory(p)) & (~meets_entry_or_residence_conditions(p)))) => ((has_illegal_residence(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_present_on_territory(p)) & (previously_met_entry_or_residence_conditions(p)))) => ((has_illegal_residence(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_passport(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_valid_identity_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((recognised_by_national_authority_with_laissez_passer_willingness(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure(p)))) => ((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((absconding_criterion_1_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_2_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_3_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_4_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_5_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_6_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_7_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_8_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_9_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_10_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_11_met(p)))) => ((at_least_one_objective_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p)) & (reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)) & (absconding_risk_is_current_and_real(p)) & (absconding_risk_established_by_individual_examination(p)) & (at_least_one_objective_absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((entered_territory_illegally_without_residence_application(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((in_illegal_residence_without_residence_application(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_submit_international_protection_application_in_time(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_3_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_termination_decision(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_7_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_8_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_other_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_9_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((file_shows_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_11_met(p))).
}

case.text: Bilal is a foreign national. He is present on Belgian territory and no longer meets the conditions for residence on the territory.

questions.text: Is there illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

expected.reason: Illegal stay is the presence on the territory of a foreigner who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry or stay.

has_belgian_nationality_proof.name: has_belgian_nationality_proof
has_belgian_nationality_proof.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_free_movement_right.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
enjoys_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The alien is present on the territory.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

previously_met_entry_or_residence_condit.name: previously_met_entry_or_residence_conditions
previously_met_entry_or_residence_condit.description: The alien previously met the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory but no longer does.

has_illegal_residence.name: has_illegal_residence
has_illegal_residence.description: The alien has illegal residence on the territory.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

has_valid_passport.name: has_valid_passport
has_valid_passport.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

has_valid_identity_document.name: has_valid_identity_document
has_valid_identity_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

recognised_by_national_authority_with_la.name: recognised_by_national_authority_with_laissez_passer_willingness
recognised_by_national_authority_with_la.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country and that authority has declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid identity/travel documents or recognition by national authority.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

absconding_risk_is_current_and_real.name: absconding_risk_is_current_and_real
absconding_risk_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding is current and real.

absconding_risk_established_by_individua.name: absconding_risk_established_by_individual_examination
absconding_risk_established_by_individua.description: The risk of absconding is established following an individual examination.

at_least_one_objective_absconding_criter.name: at_least_one_objective_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_objective_absconding_criter.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The alien is subject to a removal procedure, international protection procedure, or responsible Member State determination procedure.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien as determined by the legal conditions.

entered_territory_illegally_without_resi.name: entered_territory_illegally_without_residence_application
entered_territory_illegally_without_resi.description: The person entered the territory illegally and did not submit a residence application following that illegal entry.

in_illegal_residence_without_residence_a.name: in_illegal_residence_without_residence_application
in_illegal_residence_without_residence_a.description: The person is in illegal residence and did not submit a residence application during that illegal residence.

failed_to_submit_international_protectio.name: failed_to_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
failed_to_submit_international_protectio.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(1) is met for the person.

used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_pro.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_pro.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(2) is met for the person.

failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation or supervision of alien regulations.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(3) is met for the person.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_tr.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_tr.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_r.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal
failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_r.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_ac.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_ac.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban.name: failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_le.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_le.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_li.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_li.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restrictin.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order
failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restrictin.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_eq.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_eq.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(4) is met for the person.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(5) is met for the person.

submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_termination_decision
submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.description: The person was subject to a decision refusing entry or residence or terminating residence and immediately after submitted a new residence or international protection application.

submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_removal_measure
submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.description: The person was subject to a refusal of entry or removal measure and immediately after submitted a new residence or international protection application.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(6) is met for the person.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: The person was questioned about whether they had previously provided fingerprints in another bound State after submitting an international protection application and concealed that fact.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(7) is met for the person.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States and those applications resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(8) is met for the person.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: The person was questioned about whether they had previously submitted an international protection application in another bound State and concealed that fact.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(9) is met for the person.

declared_purpose_differs_from_applicatio.name: declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
declared_purpose_differs_from_applicatio.description: The person declared they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

file_shows_purpose_differs_from_applicat.name: file_shows_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
file_shows_purpose_differs_from_applicat.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(10) is met for the person.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(11) is met for the person.

routing.question: Is there illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Is there illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Bilal: The alien has illegal residence on the territory.
